evaluations.message: TLS 1.0 offered — testssl id TLS1, severity HIGH. PCI DSS 4.0.1 prohibits TLS 1.0/1.1; SOC 2 CC6.7 requires modern transmission encryption.
TLS 1.0 offered — testssl id TLS1. SC-8 requires confidentiality of transmitted information using approved cryptography (FIPS-validated TLS 1.2+).
TLS 1.0 offered — testssl id TLS1. SC-13 requires approved cryptographic mechanisms; TLS 1.0 is deprecated.
TLS 1.0 offered — testssl id TLS1. PCI DSS 4.0.1 4.2.1 explicitly forbids SSL and early TLS (1.0/1.1).
TLS 1.0 offered — testssl id TLS1. A.8.24 requires cryptography to be used in accordance with the organization's policy and applicable agreements.
TLS 1.0 offered — testssl id TLS1. CRY-03 requires transmission of sensitive data to use cryptographic mechanisms aligned with current standards.

findings.title: TLS1 — offered (deprecated)
findings.description: TLS 1.0 offered — testssl id TLS1, severity HIGH.
